entry.content:
医疗旅游体验差 - 斯洛文尼亚患者专属解决方案

  1. Medical Tourism Poor Experience - Exclusive Solution for Slovenia Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在斯洛文尼亚，海外患者来华就医面临签证、住宿、交通、翻译等一系列问题，体验不佳。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于斯洛文尼亚患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Slovenia, Overseas patients seeking medical care in China face visa, accommodation, transportation, translation and other issues resulting in poor experiences.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Slovenia, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

烛龙医疗提供一站式医疗旅游服务，从接机到出院全程陪同，让就医变旅行。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Aether Dragon Medical provides one-stop medical tourism services with full accompaniment from airport pickup to discharge, turning medical care into a journey.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自斯洛文尼亚患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
斯洛文尼亚患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
斯洛文尼亚患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
斯洛文尼亚患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

  1. Real Feedback from Slovenia Patients

[Case Study One]
Patient Mr./Ms. X from Slovenia, 52 years old, diagnosed with advanced lung cancer. Local hospital informed survival period was only 6 months, and targeted drug costs were too expensive for long-term affordability. Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. After 3 months of treatment, tumor significantly shrank; condition currently stable. Total cost was only 1/4 of local treatment. Patient stated: "The professionalism and attentiveness of the Aether Dragon team gave us renewed hope."

[Case Study Two]
Patient Mr./Ms. Y from Slovenia, 38 years old, suffered from rare hereditary metabolic disease, unable to obtain diagnosis for many years. Arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Peking Union Medical College Hospital for whole exome sequencing and multidisciplinary consultation; clear diagnosis achieved within 2 weeks with individualized treatment plan developed. Condition now effectively controlled with significantly improved quality of life. Patient remarked: "Without Aether Dragon, I might still be groping in darkness."

[Case Study Three]
Patient Mr./Ms. Z from Slovenia, 65 years old, required knee replacement surgery. Waited over 18 months in local public hospital queue with unbearable pain. Quickly arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Orthopedics Department of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital; from pre-operative examination to post-operative discharge took only 10 days. Surgery used latest minimally invasive technique with rapid recovery. Patient commented: "From consultation to rehabilitation, Aether Dragon provided service beyond expectations."

四、为什么选择中国医疗

[医疗技术国际领先]
中国在多个医学领域已达到或接近世界先进水平，尤其在肿瘤治疗、器官移植、微创手术、中西医结合等方面具有独特优势。

[医疗资源丰富]
拥有全球最大的医疗市场，三甲医院数量超过3000家，日均门诊量是发达国家的数倍，医生临床经验极为丰富。

[治疗成本优势明显]
同等质量的医疗服务，价格仅为欧美国家的1/3至1/5，大幅降低患者经济负担。

[就医效率高]
从预约到治疗通常只需1-2周，远快于发达国家的数月等待期，为急重症患者争取宝贵时间。

[中医药特色疗法]
独特的中医药理论体系和治疗方法，为慢性病、疑难病提供新的治疗思路和选择。

[数字化医疗创新]
互联网医院、远程会诊、AI辅助诊断等数字化医疗应用全球领先，提升就医体验和效率。

  1. Why Choose Chinese Healthcare

[Internationally Leading Medical Technology]
China has reached or approached world-advanced levels in multiple medical fields, with unique advantages especially in cancer treatment, organ transplantation, minimally invasive surgery, and integrated Chinese-Western medicine.

[Abundant Medical Resources]
Possesses the world's largest medical market with over 3,000 Grade A tertiary hospitals; daily outpatient volume is several times that of developed countries, and doctors have extremely rich clinical experience.

[Significant Treatment Cost Advantages]
Medical services of equivalent quality cost only 1/3 to 1/5 of Western countries, significantly reducing patient financial burden.

[High Medical Efficiency]
From appointment to treatment typically takes only 1-2 weeks, far faster than the multi-month waiting periods in developed countries, gaining precious time for acute and critical patients.

[Unique Traditional Chinese Medicine Therapies]
Unique TCM theoretical system and treatment methods provide new therapeutic approaches and options for chronic and difficult diseases.

[Digital Medical Innovation]
Digital medical applications including internet hospitals, remote consultations, and AI-assisted diagnosis are globally leading, enhancing medical experience and efficiency.

五、服务流程

[第一步] 免费咨询评估
通过微信、邮箱或电话进行初步沟通，了解患者基本病情和需求。

[第二步] 病历资料整理
协助整理既往病历、检查报告、影像资料等，翻译成中文供中国专家审阅。

[第三步] 医院专家匹配
根据病情匹配最合适的医院和专家，提供2-3个方案供患者选择。

[第四步] 预约确认
与医院确认预约时间，办理相关手续，发送正式邀请函用于签证申请。

[第五步] 行程规划
协助预订机票、酒店，安排接机服务，提供就医城市生活指南。

[第六步] 到院就诊
翻译陪同就诊，协助挂号、缴费、取药、检查等全流程。

[第七步] 住院治疗
如需住院，协助办理入院手续，提供住院期间的生活照料。

[第八步] 出院随访
办理出院手续，安排返程，提供术后康复指导和远程随访服务。

  1. Service Process

[Step 1] Free Consultation Assessment
Initial communication through WeChat, email or phone to understand patient basic condition and requirements.

[Step 2] Medical Record Organization
Assist in organizing past medical records, examination reports, imaging data etc., translate into Chinese for Chinese expert review.

[Step 3] Hospital Expert Matching
Match most suitable hospital and experts based on condition, provide 2-3 options for patient selection.

[Step 4] Appointment Confirmation
Confirm appointment time with hospital, process related procedures, send formal invitation letter for visa application.

[Step 5] Itinerary Planning
Assist with flight and hotel bookings, arrange airport pickup service, provide life guide for medical city.

[Step 6] Hospital Visit
Translation accompaniment for visit, assist with registration, payment, medication pickup, examinations throughout entire process.

[Step 7] Hospitalization Treatment
If hospitalization required, assist with admission procedures, provide life care during hospital stay.

[Step 8] Discharge Follow-up
Process discharge procedures, arrange return journey, provide post-operative rehabilitation guidance and remote follow-up services.

 

--------------------------------------------------

联系我们 | Contact Us

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

 

关于烛龙国际医疗

烛龙国际医疗（Aether Dragon Medical）是一家专注于为海外患者提供来华就医全流程支持的专业服务机构。

我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。

从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

[我们的优势]
- 合作网络：覆盖全国30个省市100+家三甲医院
- 专业团队：医学背景顾问+持证翻译+生活服务专员
- 服务保障：7x24小时响应，全程一对一服务
- 透明收费：服务费用明确，无隐形消费
- 隐私保护：严格保密患者信息，签署保密协议

[我们的使命]
让全球患者平等享受优质医疗资源，让跨境就医不再困难重重。

About Aether Dragon Medical

Aether Dragon Medical is a professional service organization focused on providing full-process support for overseas patients seeking medical care in China.

We do not diagnose or treat; we do one thing only: be your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" in China.

From hospital selection and expert appointments to translation accompaniment and life arrangements, we make every medical visit clear, smooth, and reassuring.

[Our Advantages]
- Partnership Network: Covers 100+ Grade A tertiary hospitals across 30 provinces and cities nationwide
- Professional Team: Medical-background consultants + certified translators + life service specialists
- Service Guarantee: 7x24 hour response, full-process one-on-one service
- Transparent Pricing: Clear service fees with no hidden charges
- Privacy Protection: Strictly confidential patient information with signed confidentiality agreements

[Our Mission]
Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.

--------------------------------------------------

联系我们 | Contact Us

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

entry.content:
临床试验入组机会少 - 捷克患者专属解决方案

  1. Clinical Trial Enrollment Opportunities Few - Exclusive Solution for Czech Republic Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在捷克，标准治疗无效的患者希望参加新药临床试验，但信息闭塞、入组门槛高。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于捷克患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Czech Republic, Patients for whom standard treatments are ineffective hope to join new drug clinical trials but face information barriers and high enrollment thresholds.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Czech Republic, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

对接多家三甲医院临床试验机构，协助评估入组条件，争取最新治疗机会。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Connects with clinical trial institutions at multiple Grade A tertiary hospitals, assists in evaluating enrollment criteria, and strives for latest treatment opportunities.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自捷克患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
捷克患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
捷克患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
捷克患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

  1. Real Feedback from Czech Republic Patients

[Case Study One]
Patient Mr./Ms. X from Czech Republic, 52 years old, diagnosed with advanced lung cancer. Local hospital informed survival period was only 6 months, and targeted drug costs were too expensive for long-term affordability. Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. After 3 months of treatment, tumor significantly shrank; condition currently stable. Total cost was only 1/4 of local treatment. Patient stated: "The professionalism and attentiveness of the Aether Dragon team gave us renewed hope."

[Case Study Two]
Patient Mr./Ms. Y from Czech Republic, 38 years old, suffered from rare hereditary metabolic disease, unable to obtain diagnosis for many years. Arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Peking Union Medical College Hospital for whole exome sequencing and multidisciplinary consultation; clear diagnosis achieved within 2 weeks with individualized treatment plan developed. Condition now effectively controlled with significantly improved quality of life. Patient remarked: "Without Aether Dragon, I might still be groping in darkness."

[Case Study Three]
Patient Mr./Ms. Z from Czech Republic, 65 years old, required knee replacement surgery. Waited over 18 months in local public hospital queue with unbearable pain. Quickly arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Orthopedics Department of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital; from pre-operative examination to post-operative discharge took only 10 days. Surgery used latest minimally invasive technique with rapid recovery. Patient commented: "From consultation to rehabilitation, Aether Dragon provided service beyond expectations."

四、为什么选择中国医疗

[医疗技术国际领先]
中国在多个医学领域已达到或接近世界先进水平，尤其在肿瘤治疗、器官移植、微创手术、中西医结合等方面具有独特优势。

[医疗资源丰富]
拥有全球最大的医疗市场，三甲医院数量超过3000家，日均门诊量是发达国家的数倍，医生临床经验极为丰富。

[治疗成本优势明显]
同等质量的医疗服务，价格仅为欧美国家的1/3至1/5，大幅降低患者经济负担。

[就医效率高]
从预约到治疗通常只需1-2周，远快于发达国家的数月等待期，为急重症患者争取宝贵时间。

[中医药特色疗法]
独特的中医药理论体系和治疗方法，为慢性病、疑难病提供新的治疗思路和选择。

[数字化医疗创新]
互联网医院、远程会诊、AI辅助诊断等数字化医疗应用全球领先，提升就医体验和效率。

  1. Why Choose Chinese Healthcare

[Internationally Leading Medical Technology]
China has reached or approached world-advanced levels in multiple medical fields, with unique advantages especially in cancer treatment, organ transplantation, minimally invasive surgery, and integrated Chinese-Western medicine.

[Abundant Medical Resources]
Possesses the world's largest medical market with over 3,000 Grade A tertiary hospitals; daily outpatient volume is several times that of developed countries, and doctors have extremely rich clinical experience.

[Significant Treatment Cost Advantages]
Medical services of equivalent quality cost only 1/3 to 1/5 of Western countries, significantly reducing patient financial burden.

[High Medical Efficiency]
From appointment to treatment typically takes only 1-2 weeks, far faster than the multi-month waiting periods in developed countries, gaining precious time for acute and critical patients.

[Unique Traditional Chinese Medicine Therapies]
Unique TCM theoretical system and treatment methods provide new therapeutic approaches and options for chronic and difficult diseases.

[Digital Medical Innovation]
Digital medical applications including internet hospitals, remote consultations, and AI-assisted diagnosis are globally leading, enhancing medical experience and efficiency.

五、服务流程

[第一步] 免费咨询评估
通过微信、邮箱或电话进行初步沟通，了解患者基本病情和需求。

[第二步] 病历资料整理
协助整理既往病历、检查报告、影像资料等，翻译成中文供中国专家审阅。

[第三步] 医院专家匹配
根据病情匹配最合适的医院和专家，提供2-3个方案供患者选择。

[第四步] 预约确认
与医院确认预约时间，办理相关手续，发送正式邀请函用于签证申请。

[第五步] 行程规划
协助预订机票、酒店，安排接机服务，提供就医城市生活指南。

[第六步] 到院就诊
翻译陪同就诊，协助挂号、缴费、取药、检查等全流程。

[第七步] 住院治疗
如需住院，协助办理入院手续，提供住院期间的生活照料。

[第八步] 出院随访
办理出院手续，安排返程，提供术后康复指导和远程随访服务。

  1. Service Process

[Step 1] Free Consultation Assessment
Initial communication through WeChat, email or phone to understand patient basic condition and requirements.

[Step 2] Medical Record Organization
Assist in organizing past medical records, examination reports, imaging data etc., translate into Chinese for Chinese expert review.

[Step 3] Hospital Expert Matching
Match most suitable hospital and experts based on condition, provide 2-3 options for patient selection.

[Step 4] Appointment Confirmation
Confirm appointment time with hospital, process related procedures, send formal invitation letter for visa application.

[Step 5] Itinerary Planning
Assist with flight and hotel bookings, arrange airport pickup service, provide life guide for medical city.

[Step 6] Hospital Visit
Translation accompaniment for visit, assist with registration, payment, medication pickup, examinations throughout entire process.

[Step 7] Hospitalization Treatment
If hospitalization required, assist with admission procedures, provide life care during hospital stay.

[Step 8] Discharge Follow-up
Process discharge procedures, arrange return journey, provide post-operative rehabilitation guidance and remote follow-up services.

 

--------------------------------------------------

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

 

关于烛龙国际医疗

烛龙国际医疗（Aether Dragon Medical）是一家专注于为海外患者提供来华就医全流程支持的专业服务机构。

我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。

从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

[我们的优势]
- 合作网络：覆盖全国30个省市100+家三甲医院
- 专业团队：医学背景顾问+持证翻译+生活服务专员
- 服务保障：7x24小时响应，全程一对一服务
- 透明收费：服务费用明确，无隐形消费
- 隐私保护：严格保密患者信息，签署保密协议

[我们的使命]
让全球患者平等享受优质医疗资源，让跨境就医不再困难重重。

About Aether Dragon Medical

Aether Dragon Medical is a professional service organization focused on providing full-process support for overseas patients seeking medical care in China.

We do not diagnose or treat; we do one thing only: be your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" in China.

From hospital selection and expert appointments to translation accompaniment and life arrangements, we make every medical visit clear, smooth, and reassuring.

[Our Advantages]
- Partnership Network: Covers 100+ Grade A tertiary hospitals across 30 provinces and cities nationwide
- Professional Team: Medical-background consultants + certified translators + life service specialists
- Service Guarantee: 7x24 hour response, full-process one-on-one service
- Transparent Pricing: Clear service fees with no hidden charges
- Privacy Protection: Strictly confidential patient information with signed confidentiality agreements

[Our Mission]
Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.

--------------------------------------------------

联系我们 | Contact Us

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

entry.title: 第二诊疗意见难求 - 圣马力诺患者专属解决方案 38. Second Medical Opinion Hard to Obtain - Exclusive Solution for San Marino Patients 烛龙国际医疗 |

entry.content:
第二诊疗意见难求 - 圣马力诺患者专属解决方案

  1. Second Medical Opinion Hard to Obtain - Exclusive Solution for San Marino Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在圣马力诺，重大疾病确诊后想寻求第二诊疗意见，但本地专家资源有限，跨院会诊困难。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于圣马力诺患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In San Marino, After major disease diagnosis, patients want second opinions but local expert resources are limited and cross-hospital consultations are difficult.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in San Marino, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

组织国内顶级专家进行远程会诊或多学科讨论，提供独立第二诊疗意见。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Organizes top domestic experts for remote consultations or multidisciplinary discussions to provide independent second medical opinions.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自圣马力诺患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
圣马力诺患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
圣马力诺患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
圣马力诺患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.

entry.title: 临终关怀服务不足 - 安道尔患者专属解决方案 37. Hospice Care

entry.content:
临终关怀服务不足 - 安道尔患者专属解决方案

  1. Hospice Care Service Insufficiency - Exclusive Solution for Andorra Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在安道尔，晚期癌症、终末期疾病患者缺乏安宁疗护，痛苦得不到缓解，尊严难以维护。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于安道尔患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Andorra, Terminal cancer and end-stage disease patients lack hospice care; suffering goes unrelieved and dignity is hard to maintain.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Andorra, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

安宁疗护病房提供疼痛控制、心理疏导、灵性关怀，让生命最后阶段更有尊严。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Hospice wards provide pain control, psychological counseling, and spiritual care to make the final life stage more dignified.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自安道尔患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
安道尔患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
安道尔患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
安道尔患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

  1. Real Feedback from Andorra Patients

[Case Study One]
Patient Mr./Ms. X from Andorra, 52 years old, diagnosed with advanced lung cancer. Local hospital informed survival period was only 6 months, and targeted drug costs were too expensive for long-term affordability. Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. After 3 months of treatment, tumor significantly shrank; condition currently stable. Total cost was only 1/4 of local treatment. Patient stated: "The professionalism and attentiveness of the Aether Dragon team gave us renewed hope."

[Case Study Two]
Patient Mr./Ms. Y from Andorra, 38 years old, suffered from rare hereditary metabolic disease, unable to obtain diagnosis for many years. Arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Peking Union Medical College Hospital for whole exome sequencing and multidisciplinary consultation; clear diagnosis achieved within 2 weeks with individualized treatment plan developed. Condition now effectively controlled with significantly improved quality of life. Patient remarked: "Without Aether Dragon, I might still be groping in darkness."

[Case Study Three]
Patient Mr./Ms. Z from Andorra, 65 years old, required knee replacement surgery. Waited over 18 months in local public hospital queue with unbearable pain. Quickly arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Orthopedics Department of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital; from pre-operative examination to post-operative discharge took only 10 days. Surgery used latest minimally invasive technique with rapid recovery. Patient commented: "From consultation to rehabilitation, Aether Dragon provided service beyond expectations."

四、为什么选择中国医疗

[医疗技术国际领先]
中国在多个医学领域已达到或接近世界先进水平，尤其在肿瘤治疗、器官移植、微创手术、中西医结合等方面具有独特优势。

[医疗资源丰富]
拥有全球最大的医疗市场，三甲医院数量超过3000家，日均门诊量是发达国家的数倍，医生临床经验极为丰富。

[治疗成本优势明显]
同等质量的医疗服务，价格仅为欧美国家的1/3至1/5，大幅降低患者经济负担。

[就医效率高]
从预约到治疗通常只需1-2周，远快于发达国家的数月等待期，为急重症患者争取宝贵时间。

[中医药特色疗法]
独特的中医药理论体系和治疗方法，为慢性病、疑难病提供新的治疗思路和选择。

[数字化医疗创新]
互联网医院、远程会诊、AI辅助诊断等数字化医疗应用全球领先，提升就医体验和效率。

  1. Why Choose Chinese Healthcare

[Internationally Leading Medical Technology]
China has reached or approached world-advanced levels in multiple medical fields, with unique advantages especially in cancer treatment, organ transplantation, minimally invasive surgery, and integrated Chinese-Western medicine.

[Abundant Medical Resources]
Possesses the world's largest medical market with over 3,000 Grade A tertiary hospitals; daily outpatient volume is several times that of developed countries, and doctors have extremely rich clinical experience.

[Significant Treatment Cost Advantages]
Medical services of equivalent quality cost only 1/3 to 1/5 of Western countries, significantly reducing patient financial burden.

[High Medical Efficiency]
From appointment to treatment typically takes only 1-2 weeks, far faster than the multi-month waiting periods in developed countries, gaining precious time for acute and critical patients.

[Unique Traditional Chinese Medicine Therapies]
Unique TCM theoretical system and treatment methods provide new therapeutic approaches and options for chronic and difficult diseases.

[Digital Medical Innovation]
Digital medical applications including internet hospitals, remote consultations, and AI-assisted diagnosis are globally leading, enhancing medical experience and efficiency.

五、服务流程

[第一步] 免费咨询评估
通过微信、邮箱或电话进行初步沟通，了解患者基本病情和需求。

[第二步] 病历资料整理
协助整理既往病历、检查报告、影像资料等，翻译成中文供中国专家审阅。

[第三步] 医院专家匹配
根据病情匹配最合适的医院和专家，提供2-3个方案供患者选择。

[第四步] 预约确认
与医院确认预约时间，办理相关手续，发送正式邀请函用于签证申请。

[第五步] 行程规划
协助预订机票、酒店，安排接机服务，提供就医城市生活指南。

[第六步] 到院就诊
翻译陪同就诊，协助挂号、缴费、取药、检查等全流程。

[第七步] 住院治疗
如需住院，协助办理入院手续，提供住院期间的生活照料。

[第八步] 出院随访
办理出院手续，安排返程，提供术后康复指导和远程随访服务。

  1. Service Process

[Step 1] Free Consultation Assessment
Initial communication through WeChat, email or phone to understand patient basic condition and requirements.

[Step 2] Medical Record Organization
Assist in organizing past medical records, examination reports, imaging data etc., translate into Chinese for Chinese expert review.

[Step 3] Hospital Expert Matching
Match most suitable hospital and experts based on condition, provide 2-3 options for patient selection.

[Step 4] Appointment Confirmation
Confirm appointment time with hospital, process related procedures, send formal invitation letter for visa application.

[Step 5] Itinerary Planning
Assist with flight and hotel bookings, arrange airport pickup service, provide life guide for medical city.

[Step 6] Hospital Visit
Translation accompaniment for visit, assist with registration, payment, medication pickup, examinations throughout entire process.

[Step 7] Hospitalization Treatment
If hospitalization required, assist with admission procedures, provide life care during hospital stay.

[Step 8] Discharge Follow-up
Process discharge procedures, arrange return journey, provide post-operative rehabilitation guidance and remote follow-up services.

 

--------------------------------------------------

联系我们 | Contact Us

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

 

关于烛龙国际医疗

烛龙国际医疗（Aether Dragon Medical）是一家专注于为海外患者提供来华就医全流程支持的专业服务机构。

我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。

从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

[我们的优势]
- 合作网络：覆盖全国30个省市100+家三甲医院
- 专业团队：医学背景顾问+持证翻译+生活服务专员
- 服务保障：7x24小时响应，全程一对一服务
- 透明收费：服务费用明确，无隐形消费
- 隐私保护：严格保密患者信息，签署保密协议

[我们的使命]
让全球患者平等享受优质医疗资源，让跨境就医不再困难重重。

About Aether Dragon Medical

Aether Dragon Medical is a professional service organization focused on providing full-process support for overseas patients seeking medical care in China.

We do not diagnose or treat; we do one thing only: be your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" in China.

From hospital selection and expert appointments to translation accompaniment and life arrangements, we make every medical visit clear, smooth, and reassuring.

[Our Advantages]
- Partnership Network: Covers 100+ Grade A tertiary hospitals across 30 provinces and cities nationwide
- Professional Team: Medical-background consultants + certified translators + life service specialists
- Service Guarantee: 7x24 hour response, full-process one-on-one service
- Transparent Pricing: Clear service fees with no hidden charges
- Privacy Protection: Strictly confidential patient information with signed confidentiality agreements

[Our Mission]
Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.

--------------------------------------------------

entry.content:
药物不良反应应对 - 列支敦士登患者专属解决方案

  1. Adverse Drug Reaction Response - Exclusive Solution for Liechtenstein Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在列支敦士登，长期服药患者出现药物不良反应，缺乏专业药师指导和替代方案。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于列支敦士登患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Liechtenstein, Long-term medication patients experience adverse drug reactions lacking professional pharmacist guidance and alternative solutions.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Liechtenstein, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

临床药学门诊提供用药评估、药物重整、不良反应监测和处理服务。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Clinical pharmacy clinics provide medication evaluation, medication reconciliation, and adverse reaction monitoring and management services.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自列支敦士登患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
列支敦士登患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
列支敦士登患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
列支敦士登患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

  1. Real Feedback from Liechtenstein Patients

[Case Study One]
Patient Mr./Ms. X from Liechtenstein, 52 years old, diagnosed with advanced lung cancer. Local hospital informed survival period was only 6 months, and targeted drug costs were too expensive for long-term affordability. Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. After 3 months of treatment, tumor significantly shrank; condition currently stable. Total cost was only 1/4 of local treatment. Patient stated: "The professionalism and attentiveness of the Aether Dragon team gave us renewed hope."

[Case Study Two]
Patient Mr./Ms. Y from Liechtenstein, 38 years old, suffered from rare hereditary metabolic disease, unable to obtain diagnosis for many years. Arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Peking Union Medical College Hospital for whole exome sequencing and multidisciplinary consultation; clear diagnosis achieved within 2 weeks with individualized treatment plan developed. Condition now effectively controlled with significantly improved quality of life. Patient remarked: "Without Aether Dragon, I might still be groping in darkness."

[Case Study Three]
Patient Mr./Ms. Z from Liechtenstein, 65 years old, required knee replacement surgery. Waited over 18 months in local public hospital queue with unbearable pain. Quickly arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Orthopedics Department of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital; from pre-operative examination to post-operative discharge took only 10 days. Surgery used latest minimally invasive technique with rapid recovery. Patient commented: "From consultation to rehabilitation, Aether Dragon provided service beyond expectations."

四、为什么选择中国医疗

[医疗技术国际领先]
中国在多个医学领域已达到或接近世界先进水平，尤其在肿瘤治疗、器官移植、微创手术、中西医结合等方面具有独特优势。

[医疗资源丰富]
拥有全球最大的医疗市场，三甲医院数量超过3000家，日均门诊量是发达国家的数倍，医生临床经验极为丰富。

[治疗成本优势明显]
同等质量的医疗服务，价格仅为欧美国家的1/3至1/5，大幅降低患者经济负担。

[就医效率高]
从预约到治疗通常只需1-2周，远快于发达国家的数月等待期，为急重症患者争取宝贵时间。

[中医药特色疗法]
独特的中医药理论体系和治疗方法，为慢性病、疑难病提供新的治疗思路和选择。

[数字化医疗创新]
互联网医院、远程会诊、AI辅助诊断等数字化医疗应用全球领先，提升就医体验和效率。

  1. Why Choose Chinese Healthcare

[Internationally Leading Medical Technology]
China has reached or approached world-advanced levels in multiple medical fields, with unique advantages especially in cancer treatment, organ transplantation, minimally invasive surgery, and integrated Chinese-Western medicine.

[Abundant Medical Resources]
Possesses the world's largest medical market with over 3,000 Grade A tertiary hospitals; daily outpatient volume is several times that of developed countries, and doctors have extremely rich clinical experience.

[Significant Treatment Cost Advantages]
Medical services of equivalent quality cost only 1/3 to 1/5 of Western countries, significantly reducing patient financial burden.

[High Medical Efficiency]
From appointment to treatment typically takes only 1-2 weeks, far faster than the multi-month waiting periods in developed countries, gaining precious time for acute and critical patients.

[Unique Traditional Chinese Medicine Therapies]
Unique TCM theoretical system and treatment methods provide new therapeutic approaches and options for chronic and difficult diseases.

[Digital Medical Innovation]
Digital medical applications including internet hospitals, remote consultations, and AI-assisted diagnosis are globally leading, enhancing medical experience and efficiency.

五、服务流程

[第一步] 免费咨询评估
通过微信、邮箱或电话进行初步沟通，了解患者基本病情和需求。

[第二步] 病历资料整理
协助整理既往病历、检查报告、影像资料等，翻译成中文供中国专家审阅。

[第三步] 医院专家匹配
根据病情匹配最合适的医院和专家，提供2-3个方案供患者选择。

[第四步] 预约确认
与医院确认预约时间，办理相关手续，发送正式邀请函用于签证申请。

[第五步] 行程规划
协助预订机票、酒店，安排接机服务，提供就医城市生活指南。

[第六步] 到院就诊
翻译陪同就诊，协助挂号、缴费、取药、检查等全流程。

[第七步] 住院治疗
如需住院，协助办理入院手续，提供住院期间的生活照料。

[第八步] 出院随访
办理出院手续，安排返程，提供术后康复指导和远程随访服务。

  1. Service Process

[Step 1] Free Consultation Assessment
Initial communication through WeChat, email or phone to understand patient basic condition and requirements.

[Step 2] Medical Record Organization
Assist in organizing past medical records, examination reports, imaging data etc., translate into Chinese for Chinese expert review.

[Step 3] Hospital Expert Matching
Match most suitable hospital and experts based on condition, provide 2-3 options for patient selection.

[Step 4] Appointment Confirmation
Confirm appointment time with hospital, process related procedures, send formal invitation letter for visa application.

[Step 5] Itinerary Planning
Assist with flight and hotel bookings, arrange airport pickup service, provide life guide for medical city.

[Step 6] Hospital Visit
Translation accompaniment for visit, assist with registration, payment, medication pickup, examinations throughout entire process.

[Step 7] Hospitalization Treatment
If hospitalization required, assist with admission procedures, provide life care during hospital stay.

[Step 8] Discharge Follow-up
Process discharge procedures, arrange return journey, provide post-operative rehabilitation guidance and remote follow-up services.

 

--------------------------------------------------

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

 

关于烛龙国际医疗

烛龙国际医疗（Aether Dragon Medical）是一家专注于为海外患者提供来华就医全流程支持的专业服务机构。

我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。

从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

[我们的优势]
- 合作网络：覆盖全国30个省市100+家三甲医院
- 专业团队：医学背景顾问+持证翻译+生活服务专员
- 服务保障：7x24小时响应，全程一对一服务
- 透明收费：服务费用明确，无隐形消费
- 隐私保护：严格保密患者信息，签署保密协议

[我们的使命]
让全球患者平等享受优质医疗资源，让跨境就医不再困难重重。

About Aether Dragon Medical

Aether Dragon Medical is a professional service organization focused on providing full-process support for overseas patients seeking medical care in China.

We do not diagnose or treat; we do one thing only: be your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" in China.

From hospital selection and expert appointments to translation accompaniment and life arrangements, we make every medical visit clear, smooth, and reassuring.

[Our Advantages]
- Partnership Network: Covers 100+ Grade A tertiary hospitals across 30 provinces and cities nationwide
- Professional Team: Medical-background consultants + certified translators + life service specialists
- Service Guarantee: 7x24 hour response, full-process one-on-one service
- Transparent Pricing: Clear service fees with no hidden charges
- Privacy Protection: Strictly confidential patient information with signed confidentiality agreements

[Our Mission]
Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.

--------------------------------------------------

entry.content:
遗传咨询检测空白 - 马来西亚患者专属解决方案

  1. Genetic Counseling Testing Gap - Exclusive Solution for Malaysia Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在马来西亚，有家族遗传病史的家庭缺乏专业遗传咨询和产前诊断服务。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于马来西亚患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Malaysia, Families with hereditary disease history lack professional genetic counseling and prenatal diagnosis services.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Malaysia, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

医学遗传科提供基因检测、遗传风险评估、产前筛查诊断一站式服务。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Medical genetics departments provide one-stop services including genetic testing, hereditary risk assessment, and prenatal screening diagnosis.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自马来西亚患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
马来西亚患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
马来西亚患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

entry.content:
亚健康状态调理无门 - 摩纳哥患者专属解决方案

  1. Sub-health Condition No Regulation Path - Exclusive Solution for Monaco Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在摩纳哥，疲劳、失眠、免疫力低下等亚健康状态西医检查无异常，但症状持续困扰。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于摩纳哥患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Monaco, Sub-health conditions like fatigue, insomnia, and low immunity show no abnormalities in Western medical tests but symptoms persistently trouble patients.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Monaco, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

中医治未病科通过辨证施治、针灸推拿、膏方调理改善亚健康状态。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Traditional Chinese medicine preventive treatment departments improve sub-health conditions through syndrome differentiation, acupuncture, massage, and herbal paste regulation.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自摩纳哥患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
摩纳哥患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
摩纳哥患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
摩纳哥患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

  1. Real Feedback from Monaco Patients

[Case Study One]
Patient Mr./Ms. X from Monaco, 52 years old, diagnosed with advanced lung cancer. Local hospital informed survival period was only 6 months, and targeted drug costs were too expensive for long-term affordability. Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. After 3 months of treatment, tumor significantly shrank; condition currently stable. Total cost was only 1/4 of local treatment. Patient stated: "The professionalism and attentiveness of the Aether Dragon team gave us renewed hope."

[Case Study Two]
Patient Mr./Ms. Y from Monaco, 38 years old, suffered from rare hereditary metabolic disease, unable to obtain diagnosis for many years. Arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Peking Union Medical College Hospital for whole exome sequencing and multidisciplinary consultation; clear diagnosis achieved within 2 weeks with individualized treatment plan developed. Condition now effectively controlled with significantly improved quality of life. Patient remarked: "Without Aether Dragon, I might still be groping in darkness."

[Case Study Three]
Patient Mr./Ms. Z from Monaco, 65 years old, required knee replacement surgery. Waited over 18 months in local public hospital queue with unbearable pain. Quickly arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Orthopedics Department of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital; from pre-operative examination to post-operative discharge took only 10 days. Surgery used latest minimally invasive technique with rapid recovery. Patient commented: "From consultation to rehabilitation, Aether Dragon provided service beyond expectations."

四、为什么选择中国医疗

[医疗技术国际领先]
中国在多个医学领域已达到或接近世界先进水平，尤其在肿瘤治疗、器官移植、微创手术、中西医结合等方面具有独特优势。

[医疗资源丰富]
拥有全球最大的医疗市场，三甲医院数量超过3000家，日均门诊量是发达国家的数倍，医生临床经验极为丰富。

[治疗成本优势明显]
同等质量的医疗服务，价格仅为欧美国家的1/3至1/5，大幅降低患者经济负担。

[就医效率高]
从预约到治疗通常只需1-2周，远快于发达国家的数月等待期，为急重症患者争取宝贵时间。

[中医药特色疗法]
独特的中医药理论体系和治疗方法，为慢性病、疑难病提供新的治疗思路和选择。

[数字化医疗创新]
互联网医院、远程会诊、AI辅助诊断等数字化医疗应用全球领先，提升就医体验和效率。

  1. Why Choose Chinese Healthcare

[Internationally Leading Medical Technology]
China has reached or approached world-advanced levels in multiple medical fields, with unique advantages especially in cancer treatment, organ transplantation, minimally invasive surgery, and integrated Chinese-Western medicine.

[Abundant Medical Resources]
Possesses the world's largest medical market with over 3,000 Grade A tertiary hospitals; daily outpatient volume is several times that of developed countries, and doctors have extremely rich clinical experience.

[Significant Treatment Cost Advantages]
Medical services of equivalent quality cost only 1/3 to 1/5 of Western countries, significantly reducing patient financial burden.

[High Medical Efficiency]
From appointment to treatment typically takes only 1-2 weeks, far faster than the multi-month waiting periods in developed countries, gaining precious time for acute and critical patients.

[Unique Traditional Chinese Medicine Therapies]
Unique TCM theoretical system and treatment methods provide new therapeutic approaches and options for chronic and difficult diseases.

[Digital Medical Innovation]
Digital medical applications including internet hospitals, remote consultations, and AI-assisted diagnosis are globally leading, enhancing medical experience and efficiency.

五、服务流程

[第一步] 免费咨询评估
通过微信、邮箱或电话进行初步沟通，了解患者基本病情和需求。

[第二步] 病历资料整理
协助整理既往病历、检查报告、影像资料等，翻译成中文供中国专家审阅。

[第三步] 医院专家匹配
根据病情匹配最合适的医院和专家，提供2-3个方案供患者选择。

[第四步] 预约确认
与医院确认预约时间，办理相关手续，发送正式邀请函用于签证申请。

[第五步] 行程规划
协助预订机票、酒店，安排接机服务，提供就医城市生活指南。

[第六步] 到院就诊
翻译陪同就诊，协助挂号、缴费、取药、检查等全流程。

[第七步] 住院治疗
如需住院，协助办理入院手续，提供住院期间的生活照料。

[第八步] 出院随访
办理出院手续，安排返程，提供术后康复指导和远程随访服务。

  1. Service Process

[Step 1] Free Consultation Assessment
Initial communication through WeChat, email or phone to understand patient basic condition and requirements.

[Step 2] Medical Record Organization
Assist in organizing past medical records, examination reports, imaging data etc., translate into Chinese for Chinese expert review.

[Step 3] Hospital Expert Matching
Match most suitable hospital and experts based on condition, provide 2-3 options for patient selection.

[Step 4] Appointment Confirmation
Confirm appointment time with hospital, process related procedures, send formal invitation letter for visa application.

[Step 5] Itinerary Planning
Assist with flight and hotel bookings, arrange airport pickup service, provide life guide for medical city.

[Step 6] Hospital Visit
Translation accompaniment for visit, assist with registration, payment, medication pickup, examinations throughout entire process.

[Step 7] Hospitalization Treatment
If hospitalization required, assist with admission procedures, provide life care during hospital stay.

[Step 8] Discharge Follow-up
Process discharge procedures, arrange return journey, provide post-operative rehabilitation guidance and remote follow-up services.

 

--------------------------------------------------

联系我们 | Contact Us

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

 

关于烛龙国际医疗

烛龙国际医疗（Aether Dragon Medical）是一家专注于为海外患者提供来华就医全流程支持的专业服务机构。

我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。

从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

About Aether Dragon Medical

Aether Dragon Medical is a professional service organization focused on providing full-process support for overseas patients seeking medical care in China.

We do not diagnose or treat; we do one thing only: be your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" in China.

From hospital selection and expert appointments to translation accompaniment and life arrangements, we make every medical visit clear, smooth, and reassuring.

[Our Advantages]

- Professional Team: Medical-background consultants + certified translators + life service specialists

entry.content:
运动损伤恢复缓慢 - 马耳他患者专属解决方案

  1. Sports Injury Slow Recovery - Exclusive Solution for Malta Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在马耳他，运动员、健身爱好者运动损伤后恢复周期长，影响职业生涯和运动表现。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于马耳他患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Malta, Athletes and fitness enthusiasts face long recovery periods after sports injuries, affecting careers and performance.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Malta, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

运动医学科采用关节镜微创手术、PRP富血小板血浆注射等先进技术加速恢复。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

Sports medicine departments use advanced technologies like arthroscopic minimally invasive surgery and PRP injections to accelerate recovery.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自马耳他患者的真实反馈

[案例一]
马耳他患者Mr./Ms. X，52岁，确诊晚期肺癌。在当地医院被告知生存期仅剩6个月，且靶向药物价格昂贵无法长期承担。通过烛龙医疗转诊至中国医学科学院肿瘤医院，接受免疫联合治疗方案。治疗3个月后肿瘤明显缩小，目前病情稳定，总费用仅为当地治疗的1/4。患者表示："烛龙团队的专业和细心让我们重拾希望。"

[案例二]
马耳他患者Mr./Ms. Y，38岁，患有罕见遗传性代谢疾病，多年未能确诊。经烛龙医疗安排至北京协和医院进行全外显子组测序和多学科会诊，2周内明确诊断并制定个体化治疗方案。现病情得到有效控制，生活质量显著改善。患者感慨："如果没有烛龙，我可能还在黑暗中摸索。"

[案例三]
马耳他患者Mr./Ms. Z，65岁，需要进行膝关节置换手术。在当地公立医院排队等待超过18个月，疼痛难忍。通过烛龙医疗快速安排至上海第六人民医院骨科，术前检查到术后出院仅用10天，手术采用最新微创技术，恢复迅速。患者评价："从咨询到康复，烛龙提供了超出预期的服务。"

  1. Real Feedback from Malta Patients

[Case Study One]
Patient Mr./Ms. X from Malta, 52 years old, diagnosed with advanced lung cancer. Local hospital informed survival period was only 6 months, and targeted drug costs were too expensive for long-term affordability. Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. After 3 months of treatment, tumor significantly shrank; condition currently stable. Total cost was only 1/4 of local treatment. Patient stated: "The professionalism and attentiveness of the Aether Dragon team gave us renewed hope."

[Case Study Two]
Patient Mr./Ms. Y from Malta, 38 years old, suffered from rare hereditary metabolic disease, unable to obtain diagnosis for many years. Arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Peking Union Medical College Hospital for whole exome sequencing and multidisciplinary consultation; clear diagnosis achieved within 2 weeks with individualized treatment plan developed. Condition now effectively controlled with significantly improved quality of life. Patient remarked: "Without Aether Dragon, I might still be groping in darkness."

[Case Study Three]
Patient Mr./Ms. Z from Malta, 65 years old, required knee replacement surgery. Waited over 18 months in local public hospital queue with unbearable pain. Quickly arranged by Aether Dragon Medical to Orthopedics Department of Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital; from pre-operative examination to post-operative discharge took only 10 days. Surgery used latest minimally invasive technique with rapid recovery. Patient commented: "From consultation to rehabilitation, Aether Dragon provided service beyond expectations."

四、为什么选择中国医疗

[医疗技术国际领先]
中国在多个医学领域已达到或接近世界先进水平，尤其在肿瘤治疗、器官移植、微创手术、中西医结合等方面具有独特优势。

[医疗资源丰富]
拥有全球最大的医疗市场，三甲医院数量超过3000家，日均门诊量是发达国家的数倍，医生临床经验极为丰富。

[治疗成本优势明显]
同等质量的医疗服务，价格仅为欧美国家的1/3至1/5，大幅降低患者经济负担。

[就医效率高]
从预约到治疗通常只需1-2周，远快于发达国家的数月等待期，为急重症患者争取宝贵时间。

[中医药特色疗法]
独特的中医药理论体系和治疗方法，为慢性病、疑难病提供新的治疗思路和选择。

[数字化医疗创新]
互联网医院、远程会诊、AI辅助诊断等数字化医疗应用全球领先，提升就医体验和效率。

  1. Why Choose Chinese Healthcare

[Internationally Leading Medical Technology]
China has reached or approached world-advanced levels in multiple medical fields, with unique advantages especially in cancer treatment, organ transplantation, minimally invasive surgery, and integrated Chinese-Western medicine.

[Abundant Medical Resources]
Possesses the world's largest medical market with over 3,000 Grade A tertiary hospitals; daily outpatient volume is several times that of developed countries, and doctors have extremely rich clinical experience.

[Significant Treatment Cost Advantages]
Medical services of equivalent quality cost only 1/3 to 1/5 of Western countries, significantly reducing patient financial burden.

[High Medical Efficiency]
From appointment to treatment typically takes only 1-2 weeks, far faster than the multi-month waiting periods in developed countries, gaining precious time for acute and critical patients.

[Unique Traditional Chinese Medicine Therapies]
Unique TCM theoretical system and treatment methods provide new therapeutic approaches and options for chronic and difficult diseases.

[Digital Medical Innovation]
Digital medical applications including internet hospitals, remote consultations, and AI-assisted diagnosis are globally leading, enhancing medical experience and efficiency.

五、服务流程

[第一步] 免费咨询评估
通过微信、邮箱或电话进行初步沟通，了解患者基本病情和需求。

[第二步] 病历资料整理
协助整理既往病历、检查报告、影像资料等，翻译成中文供中国专家审阅。

[第三步] 医院专家匹配
根据病情匹配最合适的医院和专家，提供2-3个方案供患者选择。

[第四步] 预约确认
与医院确认预约时间，办理相关手续，发送正式邀请函用于签证申请。

[第五步] 行程规划
协助预订机票、酒店，安排接机服务，提供就医城市生活指南。

[第六步] 到院就诊
翻译陪同就诊，协助挂号、缴费、取药、检查等全流程。

[第七步] 住院治疗
如需住院，协助办理入院手续，提供住院期间的生活照料。

[第八步] 出院随访
办理出院手续，安排返程，提供术后康复指导和远程随访服务。

  1. Service Process

[Step 1] Free Consultation Assessment
Initial communication through WeChat, email or phone to understand patient basic condition and requirements.

[Step 2] Medical Record Organization
Assist in organizing past medical records, examination reports, imaging data etc., translate into Chinese for Chinese expert review.

[Step 3] Hospital Expert Matching
Match most suitable hospital and experts based on condition, provide 2-3 options for patient selection.

[Step 4] Appointment Confirmation
Confirm appointment time with hospital, process related procedures, send formal invitation letter for visa application.

[Step 5] Itinerary Planning
Assist with flight and hotel bookings, arrange airport pickup service, provide life guide for medical city.

[Step 6] Hospital Visit
Translation accompaniment for visit, assist with registration, payment, medication pickup, examinations throughout entire process.

[Step 7] Hospitalization Treatment
If hospitalization required, assist with admission procedures, provide life care during hospital stay.

[Step 8] Discharge Follow-up
Process discharge procedures, arrange return journey, provide post-operative rehabilitation guidance and remote follow-up services.

 

--------------------------------------------------

联系我们 | Contact Us

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

微信 WeChat: 13921915089 / 13816488908 / Wxleooo / w886854321

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

 

关于烛龙国际医疗

烛龙国际医疗（Aether Dragon Medical）是一家专注于为海外患者提供来华就医全流程支持的专业服务机构。

我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。

从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

[我们的优势]
- 合作网络：覆盖全国30个省市100+家三甲医院
- 专业团队：医学背景顾问+持证翻译+生活服务专员
- 服务保障：7x24小时响应，全程一对一服务
- 透明收费：服务费用明确，无隐形消费
- 隐私保护：严格保密患者信息，签署保密协议

[我们的使命]
让全球患者平等享受优质医疗资源，让跨境就医不再困难重重。

About Aether Dragon Medical

Aether Dragon Medical is a professional service organization focused on providing full-process support for overseas patients seeking medical care in China.

We do not diagnose or treat; we do one thing only: be your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" in China.

From hospital selection and expert appointments to translation accompaniment and life arrangements, we make every medical visit clear, smooth, and reassuring.

[Our Advantages]
- Partnership Network: Covers 100+ Grade A tertiary hospitals across 30 provinces and cities nationwide
- Professional Team: Medical-background consultants + certified translators + life service specialists
- Service Guarantee: 7x24 hour response, full-process one-on-one service
- Transparent Pricing: Clear service fees with no hidden charges
- Privacy Protection: Strictly confidential patient information with signed confidentiality agreements

[Our Mission]
Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.

--------------------------------------------------

邮箱 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com / hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com / blackcatart@qq.com

entry.content:
旅行医学服务缺位 - 塞浦路斯患者专属解决方案

  1. Travel Medicine Service Absence - Exclusive Solution for Cyprus Patients

烛龙国际医疗 | Aether Dragon Medical

 

一、痛点深度分析

在塞浦路斯，出境旅行者缺乏疫苗接种、疾病预防等专业指导，境外患病后语言不通、就医困难。

这一问题的根源在于：
1. 医疗资源分配不均：优质医疗资源集中在少数大型医院，基层医疗机构能力不足。
2. 医保政策限制：公共医疗保险覆盖范围有限，自费比例高，患者经济压力大。
3. 诊疗流程繁琐：从初诊到确诊再到治疗，环节众多，耗时漫长。
4. 专业人才短缺：特定领域的专科医生培养周期长，供需矛盾突出。
5. 技术创新滞后：新技术、新疗法临床应用审批流程复杂，患者难以及时获益。

对于塞浦路斯患者而言，这些问题不仅仅是医疗层面的挑战，更是生活质量、家庭负担、心理健康的多重考验。

  1. In-depth Pain Point Analysis

In Cyprus, Outbound travelers lack professional guidance on vaccinations and disease prevention; falling ill abroad leads to language barriers and medical access difficulties.

The root causes of this issue include:
1. Uneven distribution of medical resources: High-quality medical resources are concentrated in a few large hospitals, while primary care institutions lack capabilities.
2. Health insurance policy restrictions: Public health insurance coverage is limited, out-of-pocket ratios are high, and patients face significant financial pressure.
3. Cumbersome diagnosis and treatment processes: From initial consultation to diagnosis and then to treatment, there are numerous steps that take a long time.
4. Shortage of specialized professionals: Training cycles for specialists in specific fields are long, and supply-demand contradictions are prominent.
5. Lagging technological innovation: Clinical application approval processes for new technologies and therapies are complex, making it difficult for patients to benefit timely.

For patients in Cyprus, these issues are not only medical challenges but also multiple tests of quality of life, family burden, and mental health.

二、烛龙医疗解决方案

国际旅行卫生保健中心提供疫苗接种、健康咨询、境外医疗救援协调服务。

我们的核心服务包括：

[精准医院匹配]
根据患者病情、预算、时间等需求，从全国100+家合作三甲医院中精准匹配最适合的医疗机构和专家团队。

[快速绿色通道]
72小时内完成专家预约、检查安排、住院手续，比常规流程节省70%以上时间。

[全程翻译陪同]
专业医学翻译团队提供从接机到出院的全程陪同服务，确保医患沟通零障碍。

[生活后勤保障]
协助办理签证、安排住宿、交通接送、餐饮推荐等生活服务，让患者专心治疗。

[术后随访管理]
出院后提供远程复诊、康复指导、用药提醒等持续服务，确保治疗效果延续。

[费用透明可控]
治疗前提供详细费用预估，无隐形消费，支持多种国际支付方式，性价比远超发达国家。

  1. Aether Dragon Medical Solutions

International travel health centers provide vaccination services, health consultations, and overseas medical rescue coordination.

Our core services include:

[Precise Hospital Matching]
Based on patient condition, budget, timing and other requirements, we precisely match the most suitable medical institutions and expert teams from over 100 partner Grade A tertiary hospitals nationwide.

[Fast Green Channel]
Complete expert appointments, examination arrangements, and hospitalization procedures within 72 hours, saving over 70% time compared to conventional processes.

[Full-process Translation Accompaniment]
Professional medical translation team provides full-process accompaniment services from airport pickup to discharge, ensuring zero barriers in doctor-patient communication.

[Life Logistics Support]
Assist with visa applications, arrange accommodation, transportation pick-up and drop-off, dining recommendations and other life services, allowing patients to focus on treatment.

[Post-operative Follow-up Management]
Provide continuous services including remote consultations, rehabilitation guidance, and medication reminders after discharge to ensure continuity of treatment effects.

[Transparent and Controllable Costs]
Provide detailed cost estimates before treatment with no hidden charges, support multiple international payment methods, offering cost-effectiveness far exceeding developed countries.

三、来自塞浦路斯患者的真实反馈

Through Aether Dragon Medical referral to Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, received immuno-combination treatment. Enable global patients to equally enjoy quality medical resources and make cross-border medical care no longer fraught with difficulties.
